---
title: "pop_pk"
author: "Grace Zang"
date: "2026-02-27"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup}
library(data.table)

set.seed(1)

# -----------------------------
# 1) Study-level constants
# -----------------------------
N  <- 150
N_male <- 75
N_fem  <- 75

# Sex coding matches Yang paper: Sex=1 male, 0 female :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}
SEX <- c(rep(1, N_male), rep(0, N_fem))

# Weight distributions from Tam 2005:
# females mean 50 kg (SD 5.1), males mean 71 kg (SD 9.9) :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}
WT <- numeric(N)
WT[SEX == 1] <- pmax(rnorm(sum(SEX==1), mean=71, sd=9.9), 40)
WT[SEX == 0] <- pmax(rnorm(sum(SEX==0), mean=50, sd=5.1), 35)

# Stomach condition: about 68% had food (meal) in Tam 2005 :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}
# Yang model uses Empty=1 for empty stomach, 0 for full stomach :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}
p_meal <- 0.68
EMPTY <- rbinom(N, size=1, prob=1 - p_meal)  # EMPTY=1 with prob 0.32

# Dose: most participants 0.5–0.7 g/kg :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}
DOSE_GKG <- runif(N, min=0.5, max=0.7)
D_g <- DOSE_GKG * WT  # grams ethanol

# -----------------------------
# 2) Yang 2011 one-comp model params with covariates
#    (final model on p.5-6) :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7}
# -----------------------------
# Fixed effects
b1 <- 4.283
b2 <- 2.100
b3 <- -0.880
b_wt    <- 0.015
b_empty <- 0.194
b_sex   <- -0.154

# Random effects covariance matrix (u-hat) reported :contentReference[oaicite:8]{index=8}
# [ b1  b2  b3 ] variances and covariances:
# var(b1)=0.209, var(b2)=0.409, var(b3)=0.192, cov(b1,b3)=0.173
Omega <- matrix(c(
  0.209, 0.000, 0.173,
  0.000, 0.409, 0.000,
  0.173, 0.000, 0.192
), nrow=3, byrow=TRUE)

# Draw eta ~ MVN(0, Omega) without extra packages
L <- chol(Omega)
Z <- matrix(rnorm(N*3), ncol=3)
ETA <- Z %*% L
eta1 <- ETA[,1]  # for Cl
eta2 <- ETA[,2]  # for ka
eta3 <- ETA[,3]  # for kel

# Individual parameters (exact forms from paper) :contentReference[oaicite:9]{index=9}
Cl  <- exp(b1 + b_wt * WT + eta1)
ka  <- exp(b2 + b_empty * EMPTY + eta2)
kel <- exp(b3 + b_sex * SEX + eta3)

# -----------------------------
# 3) Observation time grid (hours)
#    Mimics: dense early (10–15 min), then wider later :contentReference[oaicite:10]{index=10}
# -----------------------------
t_early <- seq(0.17, 1.0, by=0.17)  # ~10 min steps up to 1 h
t_late  <- seq(1.5, 3.5, by=0.5)    # then every 30 min
times <- c(0, t_early, t_late)

# -----------------------------
# 4) Concentration model (closed-form)
#    Ct = D * ka * kel / (Cl*(ka-kel)) * (exp(-kel t) - exp(-ka t)) :contentReference[oaicite:11]{index=11}
# -----------------------------
Ct_fun <- function(t, D, Cl, ka, kel){
  # avoid numerical issues if ka ~ kel
  if (abs(ka - kel) < 1e-6) return(0)
  D * ka * kel / (Cl * (ka - kel)) * (exp(-kel*t) - exp(-ka*t))
}

# Residual error: Yang reports s^2 = 11.46 (Table 3) :contentReference[oaicite:12]{index=12}
# We'll treat this as additive Normal noise with sd = sqrt(11.46).
sigma <- sqrt(11.46)

# -----------------------------
# 5) Build long dataset
# -----------------------------
out <- rbindlist(lapply(1:N, function(i){
  conc <- sapply(times, Ct_fun, D=D_g[i], Cl=Cl[i], ka=ka[i], kel=kel[i])
  dv <- pmax(conc + rnorm(length(times), 0, sigma), 0)  # BAC can't go <0

  data.table(
    ID = i,
    TIME = times,
    DV = dv,
    SEX = SEX[i],
    WT = WT[i],
    EMPTY = EMPTY[i],
    DOSE_GKG = DOSE_GKG[i]
  )
}))

# Add dosing/event columns for nlmixr2
out[, `:=`(AMT=0, EVID=0, CMT=1)]
out[TIME==0, `:=`(AMT = D_g[ID], EVID=1, DV=NA_real_)]

# Save
fwrite(out, "synthetic_yang2011_popPK.csv")
out[]
```



```{r}
library(data.table)
library(nlmixr2)

dt <- fread("synthetic_yang2011_popPK.csv")

yang_full <- function() {
  ini({
    b1 <- 4.283
    b2 <- 2.100
    b3 <- -0.880
    b_wt    <- 0.015
    b_empty <- 0.194
    b_sex   <- -0.154

    eta.cl  ~ 0.2
    eta.ka  ~ 0.4
    eta.kel ~ 0.2

    prop.err <- 0.15
  })
  model({
    Cl  <- exp(b1 + b_wt * WT + eta.cl)
    ka  <- exp(b2 + b_empty * EMPTY + eta.ka)
    kel <- exp(b3 + b_sex * SEX + eta.kel)

    d/dt(depot)   = -ka * depot
    d/dt(central) =  ka * depot - kel * central

    cp <- central
    cp ~ prop(prop.err)
  })
}

```

```{r}
fit_full <- nlmixr2(yang_full, dt, est="saem")
print(fit_full)
plot(fit_full)
```
